title: SOL 3pk x 60ml Pooper Swooper Toilet Spray Citrus Splash Fragrance 1,000+ Sprays per Pack, Air Freshener Refresher for Public Bathrooms, Office, Home, Travel-Friendly Cleaning Solution for Poo Odours
features: AFFORDABLE BATHROOM SOLUTION – Each bottle delivers 375 powerful sprays – that’s over 1,110 odour-busting spritzes per pack to keep your loo smelling lovely! A great toilet bowl spray freshener for home, office & vacation use

DESIGNED TO FRESHEN YOUR TOILET – Pooper Swooper toilet spray gets rid of the nasty smell in your toilet. This poo spray for toilet covers and masks the foul odour after a poop session and stops the bad smell from dominating in the air.

CITRUS SPLASH SCENT – The fresh, clean, and even sweet notes of Citrus Splash toilet spray freshener and toilet air freshener leaves a kind of fragrance that leaves a touch of sparkling joy and cleanness.
ODOUR-NEUTRALISING FORMULA – This toilet air refresher contains a powerful blend of oils that eliminates odours on contact. It’s kind to the nose and leaves no residue on the toilet bowl.

HANDY & EASY TO USE – Pooper Swooper Toilet spray poo is easy to use, spray 2-3 times in the room before leaving or spray around the toilet bowl. Great for travel just bring it with you in your bag to mask toilet odours anywhere you go.

Utilizing a blend of oils and natural ingredients, it attracts and neutralises odours on contact, ensuring your toilet and bathroom remains fresh after every use. Is the Citrus Splash fragrance overwhelming? No, the Citrus Splash offers a clean, fresh, and subtly sweet scent, creating an atmosphere of sparkling joy without overpowering your senses. Can I carry this toilet spray while travelling? Absolutely, its compact 60ml size is perfect for travel. Just a few sprays in the toilet bowl or room keep unpleasant smells at bay, anywhere you go. What makes this toilet spray great value? With three units per pack, it provides an effective solution for home, work, and travel, ensuring a pleasant toilet environment How easy is it to use this toilet air freshener? It's very simple. Spray 2-3 times in the toilet or room before leaving. Its high-quality formula leaves no residue, making it ideal for any toilet.
